title: Triggers new row
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, created_at) VALUES (10, 'monetdb', DEFAULT);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, created_at) VALUES (20, 'monet', DEFAULT);
CREATE TRIGGER update_new_row AFTER UPDATE ON t1 BEGIN INSERT INTO t1 (id, name) VALUES (0, 'update_new_row');
UPDATE t1 SET name = 'updated_monet' WHERE id = 20;
key_bug_features: update on t1 referencing new row as new_row
